properties: Dillandia perfoliata, also known as the "Clove-leaf or Wild Chamomile", is often used in traditional medicine for its purported therapeutic properties. Additionally, the plant is believed to have antispasmodic properties, helping to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. Some studies suggest that Dillandia perfoliata may also exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities, further supporting its use in herbal remedies. More research is needed to fully understand the therapeutic potential of this plant.
